student.name: Alex Johnson

preferences.any_other_preference: Prefer schools with strong internship placement in finance or consulting.

academic_highlights.key_coursework_summary: AP US History, AP Language & Composition, Honors Pre-Calculus, Intro to Business, Economics

student.notes: Senior applying Fall 2026. First-generation college student. Interested in finance track.

matching_notes.methodology: Discovery catalog + cache; Safety/Target/Reach; up to 20 schools listed (+ any Schools especially interested in).
